name: Chicken Plan
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup diced vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, onions)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Place the marinara sauce in a shallow dish.
3. Dip each chicken breast into the marinara sauce, coating evenly.
4. Arrange the coated chicken breasts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Add the shredded orange rind and cooked rice around the chicken breasts.
6. Sprinkle the diced vegetables over the chicken.
7. Drizzle the prepared dressing mix over everything.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
